EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IBezierCurve2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify third degree bezier curve segments and defines their properties.

[Guid("6657316F-EC45-4D6B-9526-440DE441C250")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBezierCurve2 : IBezierCurve, ICurve, IGeometry

IsLine

Indicates if the curve degenerated to a line.

bool IsLine { get; }

bool
